login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Welcome back. Enter your credentials to continue.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Spin up a new workspace in under a minute.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgot.sent: If that email exists, a reset link has been sent.

reset.title: Choose a new password
reset.subtitle: Pick something at least 8 characters long.
reset.invalid: This reset link is invalid or expired.

invite.title: Accept invitation
invite.subtitle: Set up your account to join the workspace.
invite.invalid: This invitation is invalid or expired.

no_account.title: No active workspace
no_account.body: Your user has no active workspace. Ask an administrator for an invitation.
